PERIOD SAMPLED:  1962-65, 1967-77, 1981-82, 1984-85, 100187-093088, 100190-093091.  MAJOR BASIN NAME:  MISSOURI.  BASIN CODE:  090707.  MINOR BASIN NAME:  BIG SIOUX RIVER.
